title: Lifewit 145L Extra Large Laundry Hamper with Lid, Laundry Basket 2 Section with Removable Washing Bags, Divided 2 Compartments Laundry Sorter Organizer for Bedroom Bathroom Laundry Room, White
features: Large Laundry Basket: Organize your laundry effortlessly with our spacious laundry basket, available in 145L, 160L, and 180L capacities. Perfect for storing a week’s worth of clothes, it minimizes your trips to the laundry room. Suitable for any space—bedroom, laundry room, bathroom, or closet—this basket helps eliminate messy piles of laundry

Sturdy Structure and Non-deformation: Crafted from thicker 8mm fiber rods, with a reinforced 2.5mm thick cardboard base and embedded metal frame at the top, this laundry hamper is built to last. It maintains its shape even when full and won’t collapse or deform over time. The secure lid design keeps dust and odors out, ensuring a clean and tidy environment

2-compartment Design: With its unique 2-compartment layout, this laundry hamper with lid makes sorting clothes a breeze. Organize your laundry from the moment you use it, saving you time before washing and preventing color bleeding or damage to delicate fabrics

Premium Material: Made from wear-resistant polypropylene, water-repellent fabric, this clothes hamper is perfect for handling heavy loads. It features a strong side handle for easy transport whenever needed

Easy to Install and Foldable: This collapsible laundry basket organizer comes with straightforward installation instructions, making assembly quick and hassle-free. Just insert the support rods, and it’s ready to use in under a minute. Plus, it folds easily for compact storage when not in use, minimizing space requirements
description: Product Description Optimize Your Laundry Routine Previous page Next page Improve the Quality of Laundry Basket from Details Sturdy Insert Rods The sturdy insert rods provide exceptional support and ensure stability, making it capable of withstanding heavy loads without bending or collapsing. Sturdy Handles The sturdy handles are built to withstand frequent use and provide a secure and comfortable grip even when carrying heavy items. Tough Lid with Cardboard The lid is constructed and reinforced with cardboard for added strength and durability that can protect the contents inside. Foldable Design Making it easy to set up or pack away when not in use. It enables convenient storage in small spaces and effortless transportation when needed.
